affordances.name: Evidence before treatment checkpoint
affordances.mechanism: The record keeps operational treatment tied to exact source support while allowing the section label to remain unknown when no reliable heading exists.

use_when: The source quote supports a treatment move but does not sit under a reliable heading.
A reviewer can preserve quote provenance without inventing a section label.
do_not_use_when: A nearby heading exists and can be named without changing the source truth.
case_evidence_needed: The exact quote that supports the affordance and the reason the section hint is unknown.

treatment_requirements.description: Keep the exact quote and mark the section as unknown instead of inventing a source heading.
evidence_required: An exact source quote that appears in the source file.
good_output_shape: A provenance span with section_hint set to unknown_section and no invented heading.

diagnostic_questions: Does the exact quote support this treatment move without requiring an invented section label?
misuse_guards: Do not create a plausible heading when the source has no reliable section marker.

source_evidence.source_quote: This exact source sentence supports an affordance even though the section label is not reliably recoverable.
This exact source sentence supports an affordance even though the section label is not reliably recoverable.

review_notes.normalization_note: Fixture proving unknown_section is a valid provenance value when the source does not offer a reliable heading.
